overall.description: A continuous drive along an elevated highway in a futuristic cyberpunk city. The camera passes rusted industrial power line towers and massive digital billboards featuring anime characters and advertisements, with a gigantic stadium structure visible on the right. The footage is clearly from a video game engine with high-quality rendering.

dense network of horizontal wires suspended between metal towers
concrete wall with yellow and black diagonal hazard stripes

segments.scene_description: Driving along an elevated highway with rusted industrial power line towers on the left and a massive futuristic stadium visible on the right. The concrete noise barrier with hazard stripes lines the immediate left edge while several vehicles occasionally pass by in the adjacent lanes.

segments.scene_description: The highway continues alongside a massive wall of digital billboards displaying anime characters and water advertisements that temporarily obscure the industrial infrastructure. The futuristic stadium remains visible in the distance on the right while the camera moves parallel to the advertisement screens.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with industrial catenary infrastructure

concrete wall with yellow and black diagonal hazard stripes

segments.scene_description: Past the billboards, the highway returns to the industrial landscape with rusted power line towers and concrete barriers lining the left side. The massive stadium structure continues to dominate the right skyline as vehicles occasionally pass by in the right lane.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along an elevated highway that transitions from a rusted industrial corridor into a vibrant digital landscape before returning to a gritty urban environment. It begins by gliding past weathered power line towers and concrete noise barriers with hazard stripes, while a massive futuristic stadium looms over the right skyline. As the camera advances, the industrial view is temporarily obscured by a towering wall of digital billboards flashing anime characters and water advertisements. The scene then shifts back to the industrial landscape as the billboards recede, revealing the rusted towers and concrete barriers once more. Finally, the camera continues its forward motion with vehicles passing in the adjacent lanes, while the stadium structure remains a dominant fixture of the distant horizon.
